page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Circos is a software package for visualizing data and information. It visualizes data in a circular layout
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Circos is tool for visualizing data in a circular format. it was developed for genomic data but can work for many other kinds of data as well.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Circos is tool for visualizing data in a circular format. It was developed for genomic data but can work for many other kinds of data as well.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Circos is tool for visualizing data in a circular format. It was developed for genomic data but can work for many other kinds of data as well.
